3215030.name: Abyss Rebirth
3215030.description:
You are an adventurer who has visited Midgard, the central city of this game's world.
You can complete requests or gather friends at the bar.
Gain experience as an adventurer by defeating monsters scattered all over the place.



●Explore various places
Let's explore various places from the royal capital.
During exploration, various events occur in addition to battles with monsters.
Let's improve your abilities as an adventurer while accumulating experience points.



●Labyrinth of the Abyss
It is an unexplored labyrinth that no one has yet ventured into.
It is said that gold and silver treasures never seen before are buried here.
Once you're confident in your skills as an adventurer, try exploring the Abyss Labyrinth.



●Abundant customizability
Develop your character by freely choosing from a wide variety of classes and equipment.
This game offers a wide range of customization options.




●Beautiful illustrations
There are various characters that you can make friends with.
This work uses beautiful illustrations of standing pictures.
